features.pairProgrammingDesc: Edit the same file simultaneously. Both cursors work in real-time — no conflicts, no lag, no screen sharing.
features.liveExecutionDesc: Run your code against real test cases in seconds. Watch results stream in live — not a simulation.
features.aiFeedbackDesc: Instant analysis of time complexity, edge cases, and code quality. Like having a senior engineer review your solution.
features.aiInterviewerDesc: Practice with an AI that asks follow-ups, probes your thinking, and gives structured feedback. Like a real technical interview.
features.aiQuestion: How does your hash map handle duplicate values?
features.youAnswer: We check the complement before inserting...

cta.sub: Start coding together in seconds. No setup, no screen sharing, no friction.
